titleStmt.title: SII 16.225: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 225. (A.R. No. 59 of 1917.) AINAVŌLU, GUNTUR TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up before the Vēṇugōpālasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1480 (current), Piṅgala, Pushya ba. 10, Thursday corresponding to 1558 A.D., January 13, f.d.t. °23.

It registers the gift of the dommaripannu collected in the village Ayanavōlu to god Gōpinātha of that village by the dommaris Chiṁku-reḍḍi Narasā-nēṇḍu and Komara Vīrayya for the merit of their twenty-four families when Siddhirāju Timmarājayya was administering Koṇḍavīṭi-sīma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1480 Agunēṁṭi piṁgaḷa sa
ṁvatsara puṣya ba 10 gu . śrī
madrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
sadāśiva dēvamahārāyalu vijayanaga
ramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanāsīnulai pṛdhvīsā
mrāṁjyamunnu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara siddhirāju tiṁmmarājayyavāru
koṁḍavīṭisīma pāliṁcaṁgānu Ayanavōli śrī
gōpinādhani nagari muṁdara Āsthānamai vēṁcēśi pra
mukhyamaina cālumūla samasta sama
ya pekkaṁḍra paṁpunānu doṁmari

ciṁkureḍi na
rasānēṁḍu ko
māra vīrayānu
svāmiki mrokki
Iccina dha¨rmmaśāsa
naṁ . Ī grāmaṁ pra
jalu Ice doṁma
ripannu yellakā
lānakunnu 24 ku
lānakunnu puṇya
ṁgānu tiruvaibha
vānaku dhāravō
si Istimi Ī pu
ṇyānaku tappi
na vāru vaitara
ṇī nadilō tō
sinavāru
Digital edition of SII 16.225 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
